data.name: Seductive Tombs: Beach Love
data.detailed_description:
More from Sinnera



關於此遊戲



It's puzzle time and Seductive Tombs series is back with the hottest girls, lovely beaches and some nice weather! Find the right combinations of levers to solve the puzzle and reveal high quality, realistic, naughty & sexy girls! Earn all the stars to beat record scores and unlock achievements.

Now with the Skip Level feature!

  • 15 challenging levels
  • Uncensored content
  • Beat the record times to earn stars
  • Realistic graphics
  • Atmospheric music
  • 30 achievements
  • Display girls from the gallery
  • Easily skip levels - unlock girls if you can't beat a level for more than 10 mins

data.short_description: It's puzzle time and Seductive Tombs series is back with the hottest girls, lovely beaches and some nice weather! Find the right combinations of levers to solve the puzzle and reveal high quality, realistic, naughty & sexy girls! Earn all the stars to beat record scores and unlock achievements.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and above
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4600 or equivalent (1 GB VRAM)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX Compatible Sound Card
  • 備註: Mouse, Keyboard
